item.title: FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 3min Cristian Chivu will stay at Inter next season and negotiations will continue ove
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 3min Cristian Chivu will stay at Inter next season and negotiations will continue over new contract.
“He’s obviously staying, he’s gonna be with us again. Chivu is one of the best emerging managers in Europe”, says Inter president Marotta. 151 80 796 17 mil

item.title: mjcritchley: Laurie Whitwell reposteó Mark Critchley @mjcritchley · 3h Michael Carrick's substitutions came under the spotlight in de
item.description:
Laurie Whitwell reposteó Mark Critchley @mjcritchley · 3h Michael Carrick's substitutions came under the spotlight in defeat to Leeds
Carrick makes his first sub later than any other Premier League manager on average
It was a similar story at Middlesbrough too De nytimes.com 37 122 411 50 mil
